spec.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Total Nodes" FROM nodes

SELECT
  build_version,
  status::text,
  total_nodes,
  success_count,
  failed_count,
  ROUND(100.0 * success_count / NULLIF(total_nodes, 0), 1) AS success_pct,
  created_at,
  updated_at
FROM deployment_jobs
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 20

spec.description: Agent deployment job history with per-node success/failure counts
spec.title: Deployment Jobs

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  n.hostname,
  d.started_at,
  d.ended_at,
  d.duration_s,
  CASE WHEN d.ended_at IS NULL THEN 'ONGOING' ELSE 'RESOLVED' END AS state
FROM node_downtime_events d
JOIN nodes n ON d.node_id::uuid = n.node_id
ORDER BY d.started_at DESC
LIMIT 30

spec.description: Historical and ongoing downtime windows per node
spec.title: Node Downtime Events

spec.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Reachable" FROM node_bgw_state WHERE reachable = true
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Open Alerts" FROM system_alert WHERE resolved_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Incidents" FROM container_behavior_incidents WHERE observed_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

SELECT
  n.hostname,
  n.status::text AS status,
  n.os_name,
  n.cpu_model,
  n.cpu_cores,
  n.memory_total,
  n.pci_gpu_count AS gpus,
  COALESCE(b.reachable::text, 'unknown') AS reachable,
  COALESCE(b.severity, 'unknown') AS severity,
  COALESCE(b.consecutive_failures, 0) AS consecutive_failures,
  n.agent_version,
  n.registered_at
FROM nodes n
LEFT JOIN node_bgw_state b ON n.node_id = b.node_id
ORDER BY n.hostname

spec.description: All registered nodes with current reachability and BGW state
spec.title: Node Fleet

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(observed_at, $__interval),
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE verdict = 1) AS "Passed",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE verdict = 0) AS "Failed"
FROM node_health_observations
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

spec.description: Pass/fail count of health observations per interval
spec.title: Node Health Check Results Over Time

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(triggered_at, $__interval),
  severity,
  COUNT(*) AS count
FROM system_alert
WHERE $__timeFilter(triggered_at)
GROUP BY 1, severity
ORDER BY 1

spec.description: Alerts triggered per interval, by severity
spec.title: System Alerts Over Time

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(observed_at, $__interval),
  confidence_tier,
  COUNT(*) AS count
FROM container_behavior_incidents
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
GROUP BY 1, confidence_tier
ORDER BY 1

spec.description: Security incidents per interval, by confidence tier
spec.title: Container Security Incident Rate

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  cbi.observed_at,
  n.hostname,
  cbi.container_id,
  cbi.rule_name,
  cbi.confidence_tier,
  cbi.action_taken,
  cbi.source,
  cbi.detail
FROM container_behavior_incidents cbi
LEFT JOIN nodes n ON cbi.node_id = n.node_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(cbi.observed_at)
ORDER BY cbi.observed_at DESC
LIMIT 50

spec.description: Latest container behavior incidents with action taken
spec.title: Recent Security Incidents
